result.stdout:
3.9.1.3+e36e7bad7e

Generates .neo-trace files for transactions on a public Neo N3 blockchains

Usage: neotrace [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  block         Trace all transactions in a specified block
  transaction   Trace the specified transaction

Run 'neotrace [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Trace all transactions in a specified block

Usage: neotrace block [options] <BlockIdentifier>

Arguments:
  BlockIdentifier         Block index or hash

Options:
  -r|--rpc-uri <RPC_URI>  URL of Neo JSON-RPC Node
                          Specify MainNet (default), TestNet or JSON-RPC URL
  -?|-h|--help            Show help information.
